metadata.description: One-click install of the management-portal MCP operator for Claude Code — the MCP server plus the full agent discipline (skill, portal-operator subagent, /portal command, read-after-write hooks).

plugins.name: management-portal
plugins.description: Operate the management-portal MCP with the full agent discipline — the core loop, the three gates (read-after-write, completeness, task-breakdown), bottom-up completion, never-fabricate-ids, and board-first. Bundles the MCP server, the management-portal skill, the portal-operator subagent, the /portal command, and the read-after-write hooks. On install you are prompted once for your API key (stored in your OS keychain).
